description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring a mix of green lawns, paved walkways, and outdoor amenities. The main structure is surrounded by a white boundary wall and includes a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious patio area. The property features a swimming pool with adjacent lounge seating, a pergola, and several trees providing shade and visual interest. A long, elevated walkway connects the bungalow to a detached garage or auxiliary building, with a driveway and parking area visible. The garden is well-maintained, with a mix of open grassy areas and decorative plantings. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped garden, pool, and a detached garage connected by a long walkway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow's layout with the main house, pool, pergola, and garden, as well as the long walkway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, the pool area, pergola, and the open lawn, with the garage and driveway in the background.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective of the front garden, the main entrance, and the arrangement of trees and patio spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the front facade, the driveway, parking area, and the connection between the garage and the main house via the walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
